description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a modern main battle tank, featuring a long, prominent cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull is angular with sloped armor plating, providing enhanced protection, and the vehicle sits on a tracked chassis for superior off-road mobility. The exterior is finished in a weathered, multi-tone camouflage pattern with green and brown splotches over a light base, designed to break up its outline. The turret includes visible hatches and periscopes, and the sides of the hull show signs of wear and mud splatter, indicating operational use. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present on the surface. The vehicle's robust construction and design suggest it is built for frontline combat and urban operations.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon and angular, camouflaged hull, designed for tactical operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, sloped glacis plate, central cannon barrel, and angular turret with hatches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, the sloped side armor, and the continuous track system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the turret, engine deck, and the rear hull with no visible armaments.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, side armor, and track system with visible weathering.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts or hardpoints.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Weathered camouflage with irregular green and brown patches over a beige base, applied in a blotchy, non-digital style.
